description: 21 - 29-01-2025 - Email to Peter Mandelson from Personnel Security Team, FCDO
text:
From: JCS Personal
Sent: Wed 29/01/2025 6:28:36 PM (UTC)
To: Peter Mandelson Personal
Subject: DV Certificate
Attachment: FCDO DV Clearance Certificate Mandelson.pdf
Attachment: 2024-03-11- Personal — Security Induction Letter.pdf
Attachment: New-STRAP-Form.docx
Peter

Please find attached your DV certificate along with the DV induction letter from
Vincent Devine.
| also attach a strap form for your completion, | understand JCS __ ishelping you

wit your admin, so | will separately send him a copy of this form.

JCS | Head of Personnel Security Team
Cluster 4 Security, Estates Security and Resilence Department, ESND
Personal | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, King Charles St |
London | SW1A 2AH
Telephone: Mobile: Personal | email: Personal
A-Z Guidance - Developed Vetting (DV) and Security Check (SC) clearances

61
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.

messages.subject: DV Certificate
